prompt: A gritty, high-contrast cinematic action movie poster in a vertical one-sheet layout for a revenge thriller titled DEADLINE VENGEANCE. The composition is dominated by a large foreground figure of a tough middle-aged man with short dark hair, rugged stubble, and a black leather or tactical jacket, aiming a semi-automatic handgun directly at the viewer from the left side of the frame with strong foreshortening so the gun appears oversized and close to camera. His face is partially obscured in shadow for a mysterious, menacing look. Behind him is a dark modern city skyline at night under stormy clouds, with 1 helicopter in the upper right sky and 1 massive fireball explosion on the right side near the buildings, sending smoke, sparks, and debris into the air. Across the very top, small red uppercase text reads REVENGE IS HIS MISSION. On the left-center area, add a stacked white uppercase tagline in 4 lines: THE PAST TOOK EVERYTHING. HE'LL TAKE EVERYTHING BACK., styled as 2 short blocks separated by thin red accent lines. Place the main title huge across the lower middle, with 2 words: the first word in enormous distressed metallic-white block letters, and the second word in slightly smaller bold red uppercase letters. In the bottom third, show 1 lone male figure from behind standing in the middle of a wet reflective street, holding a pistol, facing the burning city. Surround him with 4 police vehicles total, 2 on the left and 2 on the right, with flashing lights, plus 2 additional helicopters in the distant sky near the horizon, making 3 helicopters total in the full poster. Include flames along both lower corners, wreckage, smoke, embers, and silhouettes of several armed figures in the distance. At the bottom center, add red uppercase release text COMING SOON with smaller white text underneath reading EXPERIENCE IT IN IMAX. Add a dense strip of tiny fake production credits and a film rating box at the very bottom. Color palette: black, charcoal, steel gray, orange fire, and deep crimson. Style: polished Hollywood blockbuster key art, dramatic rim lighting, photorealistic, ultra-detailed, intense contrast, anamorphic action lighting, smoky atmosphere, explosive urban chaos, premium theatrical poster design.
